initial_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

1 { B : color(B) } 1 :- input(0,0,B).

isBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B).

row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- row(R), col(C).

output(R, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), V != B.

output(R-3, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V), V != B, R >= 4, R < 5, C+7 < M, isBg(R-1, C).

output(R+1, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), V != B, R >= 5, R < 6, R+1 < N, isBg(R+1, C).

#show output/3.

n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

color(B) :- input(0,0,B).

isBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B).

row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- row(R), col(C).

output(R, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), V != B.

output(R-3, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V), V != B, R >= 4, R < 5, C+7 < M, isBg(R-1, C).

output(R+1, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), V != B, R >= 5, R < 6, R+1 < N, isBg(R+1, C).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

bg_color(B) :- input(0,0,B).

isBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B).

row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- row(R), col(C).

output(R, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), bg_color(B), V != B.

output(R-3, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V), bg_color(B), bind_cols(M), C+7 < M, isBg(R-1, C), V != B.

output(R+1, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), bg_color(B), bind_rows(N), (R+1) < N, isBg(R+1, C), V != B.

bind_rows(N) :- n_rows(N).
bind_cols(M) :- n_cols(M).
#show output/3.

final_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

bg_color(B) :- input(0,0,B).

isBg(R,C) :- input(R, C, B).

row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- row(R), col(C).

output(R, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), bg_color(B), V != B.

output(R-3, C+7, V) :- input(R, C, V), bg_color(B), bind_cols(M), C+7 < M, isBg(R-1, C), V != B.

output(R+1, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), bg_color(B), bind_rows(N), (R+1) < N, isBg(R+1, C), V != B.

bind_rows(N) :- n_rows(N).
bind_cols(M) :- n_cols(M).
#show output/3.
